message:
refactor(db): migrate ReadCache and QueryTracker locks to OrderedMutex/OrderedRwLock

Replace bare std::sync::Mutex and RwLock in ReadCache (6 locks for
projects_by_slug, projects_by_human_key, agents_by_key, agents_by_id,
deferred_touches, last_touch_flush) and QueryTracker (inner) with
OrderedMutex/OrderedRwLock using explicit LockLevel assignments. This
eliminates manual PoisonError handling and enrolls every DB lock in
the global deadlock detector.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
